project_overview.name: KiteAlgo - Pro Trading Terminal
project_overview.tone: Precision, High-Frequency, Institutional, 'The Matrix' but usable

theme_strategy.rationale: Trading terminals must be dark to reduce eye strain during long market sessions and to make color-coded data (Green/Red) pop instantly.

mono_font.name: JetBrains Mono
mono_font.usage: Prices, PnL, Order Book, Logs, Code Snippets

rules: Use JetBrains Mono for ALL numerical data, especially prices and PnL.
Headings (h1-h3) use IBM Plex Sans font-medium or font-semibold. Avoid font-black.
Tabular lining figures for data tables to ensure alignment.

layout_system.gap_strategy: gap-2 or gap-4 (Tight for data density)
layout_system.border_radius: rounded-sm (2px) or rounded-md (4px). Avoid large rounded corners.

variants.buy: bg-emerald-600 hover:bg-emerald-500 text-white font-mono uppercase tracking-wider
variants.sell: bg-rose-600 hover:bg-rose-500 text-white font-mono uppercase tracking-wider
variants.kill_switch: bg-destructive text-destructive-foreground border-2 border-red-900 hover:bg-red-700 font-bold uppercase tracking-widest shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(239,68,68,0.5)]

cards.interaction: No hover lift for data cards. Static reliability.

status_indicators.live: w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-emerald-500 shadow-[0_0_8px_#10B981] animate-pulse

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use sparingly. Only for sticky headers or command palettes. backdrop-blur-md bg-black/70 border-b border-white/10.
visual_enhancers.scanlines: Optional: very subtle repeating-linear-gradient on the background of the 'Terminal/Logs' section to give a retro-tech feel.
visual_enhancers.borders: Use 'Grid Borders' strategy. 1px borders between all dashboard widgets to create a structured control panel look.

dashboard_overview.layout: Grid 12-col. Top row: Key Metrics (PnL, Margin). Middle: Main Chart (Left 8), Positions (Right 4). Bottom: Logs/Orders.
dashboard_overview.key_feature: Equity Curve must be prominent. PnL text color must dynamically switch green/red.

trade_monitor.style: Spreadsheet-like density. Alternating row colors optional but keep contrast high.
trade_monitor.columns: Symbol, Signal, Qty, Entry, LTP, PnL, Status, Action

strategy_editor.style: Code-editor vibe. Darker background (#050505). Syntax highlighting colors for parameters.
strategy_editor.inputs: Input fields should look like terminal inputs (no background, bottom border only) OR solid matte boxes.

risk_controls.style: Hazard UI. Use yellow/amber striping for warning zones. The Kill Switch must be separated visually from other controls.

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5px or 2px. Sharp edges preferred.

images.logo_placeholder: Use a simple geometric shape (e.g., a hexagon or diamond) using CSS/SVG. No external logo images needed.

universal_guidelines: NEVER use gradients for text in a dashboard. Legibility is paramount.
Always use 'data-testid' on interactive elements (buttons, inputs, rows).
Don't animate chart data points excessively. Updates should be snappy.
Use 'sonner' for notifications (Trade executed, Error, etc.).
Scrollbars: Customize to be thin and dark (bg-zinc-900 thumb-zinc-700).
Input fields: Use Shadcn Input but customize ring color to brand primary.
Contrast: Ensure text on Red/Green badges is readable (usually White text on Dark Red/Green is better than Black text).

instructions_to_main_agent.step_1: Setup the dark theme in tailwind.config.js and index.css as defined in 'theme_strategy'.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_2: Install the required fonts via Google Fonts import in index.css.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_3: Create the layout shell (Sidebar + Main Content Area). Use a fixed sidebar for quick navigation.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_4: Implement the Dashboard page with dummy data first to establish the grid layout.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_5: Build the 'Live Trade Monitor' using a dense table component.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_6: Implement the 'Strategy Editor' with form components.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_7: Build the 'Risk Controls' with the distinct Kill Switch UI.
